title: Capture stub optional source field: mined-unconfirmed stubs ride the normal flush
action: Per D6: addCaptureStub (capture.mjs:53-76, both mirror copies) gains an optional source field (string|null, default null, trimmed); capture add CLI + registry schema gain --source; capture list renders a [mined] marker for stubs with source "mined" so the flush operator sees provenance; pendingCaptureStubs and flush machinery unchanged (flush-by-id already agnostic — a mined stub sitting unflushed in the pending queue IS the mined-unconfirmed state; the normal flush is the confirmation). Tests at BOTH levels: templates/tests/test_lib.mjs covers addCaptureStub (no source => today's byte-shape; with source => persists); templates/tests/test_bee_cli.mjs gains capture add --source CLI coverage (flag accepted, stub persisted with source, capture list shows the [mined] marker, flush works identically). Update .bee/bin mirrors byte-identically. RED-first: record failing test output (red_failure_evidence) before implementing.

truths: a stub created without --source is byte-shape-identical to today's stubs (additive change only)
capture list visibly distinguishes mined stubs
flush of a mined stub uses the existing path with zero special-casing
lib mirror and bee.mjs copies stay byte-identical
prohibitions: no auto-flush and no auto-promotion of mined stubs to decisions (D6)
no change to the high-risk-lane throw in addCaptureStub

trace.outcome: Capture stub gains optional source field (additive, byte-shape-identical when absent); capture add --source CLI flag; capture list renders a [mined] marker; flush unchanged (D6). Both mirror pairs (lib/capture.mjs, lib/command-registry.mjs) byte-identical; bee.mjs template copied to .bee/bin/bee.mjs and cmp-verified identical.
